title: Constant conditions and generates
body:
I am using a bind for some verification and my DUT has a part of the design I want to tap into iff a parameter is set. The signal is only defined when the parameter is set in a generate and I don't own the code. So, my naive approach is

```verilog
bind dut monitor u_bind(
    .signal(u_mod_in_dut.PARAMETER ? u_mod_in_dut.gen_block_name.signal : 0)
);
```
This fails when `PARAMETER` is 0 with the signal name being unknown. My LRM reading expertise is not sufficient to understand what is supposed to happen. Happy to have a look at fixing by evaluating constant expressions earlier (I suppose) so that it will evaluate to 0, if you think my solution should or could be supported.
